---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new widget, enhancement, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you envision this working. Include API sketches, HTML/CSS examples, or mockups if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why they're less suitable.

## Additional Context

Links to similar implementations, related issues, or relevant Bootstrap components.
